name: phase-38.7-quorum-direct
description: Phase-38.7 advisory-lane prompts — architectural should-I questions that reliably fire quorum fan-out.

prompts.message: Should I refactor the intent-router module now or defer until Phase-39? Give me architectural guidance.
Recommend the best architecture pattern for the embedding cache: in-memory LRU or on-disk SQLite? Explain tradeoffs.
Should we centralize all tool telemetry behind a single emitter, or keep per-module emitters? Recommend with rationale.
Is it better architecturally to model quorum modes as an enum or a pluggable strategy interface? Advise.
Should the pattern detector registry be eager-loaded at server boot or lazy-loaded on first request? Give architectural guidance.
Recommend whether to expose session-memory writes over MCP or keep them internal to Forge-Master. Explain the security tradeoffs.
